updated_claims.notes: Trump's statement reported by @Osint613 claims Iran's navy 'completely obliterated - 158 ships', but this is a political claim without independent verification.
Israel Hayom report cited by @Osint613 claims US began enforcing naval blockade, targeting all vessels entering and exiting Iranian ports.
Oil prices surged above $100/barrel, with some comments linking it to the Strait of Hormuz blockade, suggesting a correlation but not direct causation.
